goal: Add a side-effect-free patch candidate builder for the BPK-059 cockpit mount patch preflight, describing candidate files and guard checks without applying patches, changing server, route, renderer, runtime, package, workflow, or deployment files.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mutate server files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, or deployment files.
claims: Cockpit server patch candidates can be represented without applying them.
Ready BPK-059 preflight and candidate refs are required.
assumptions: A later patch application task would need a new lock.
dod: Ready, missing candidate ref, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, or deployment changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-059 preflighted the cockpit mount patch without changing files.
